name: Chocolate Chip- Pop't Wheat Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Soda mixed with 1 teaspoon Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the shortening, sugar, honey, eggs, and vanilla until creamy.
2. Add salt and flour to the mixture. Stir in the soda-water solution.
3. Gradually fold in the oatmeal, chocolate chips, and pop-tops wheat (last).
4. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a lightly greased cookie sheet or chill the dough and roll into balls.
5. Bake for 10 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Note: Pop-tops wheat can be purchased at most bakery supply stores, but it is often easier and less expensive to buy cereal from your local grocery store.
